author: Davey Fromthenavy
review: Update: Fleas on the 3rd floor as of April - one of the units has a warning on their door. Management did not give any notice to tenants that there were fleas in the building.

author: Jordan Grant
review: Lived here for a little over 2 months so far and no issues! Quiet and good location with trails. Will update if anything changes.

author: Helen kh

author: Trevor M
review: Spend your money elsewhere... We moved into this brand new building that had and still has more issues than they know what to do with. If you can even get a hold of someone in their office they'll just play dumb and act sorry. Maintenance

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your feedback, as it helps us make improvements for the community. We are sorry you have not been satisfied with your experience so far at Crescent, and we take your concerns seriously. Our maintenance team should have been in touch with you regarding the items you have requested service for, but we will make sure to follow up if there is anything else we can take care of for you. We hope we can improve your experience going forward.

author: Murasaki
review: PTLA management appears to have an "absent management" business model. Locations do not appear to have full time staff, and I attempted at this property and others in the Bellingham area to get a walk through of various listed studio and

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your feedback, and we apologize that you've had trouble getting in touch with someone from our team. Please call our Crescent office directly to speak with our dedicated staff member for this community.
